intro: The ground splits open onto a glowing lava tube, heat hammering up from the dark. Molten veins of ore glitter far below, where something vast turns in its sleep.
title: Into the Caldera
description: A lava tube plunges into the heart of the volcano. Descend it for a growing money haul and, deep down, a chance at the Molten Core relic - but each descent scorches your non-Fire Pokemon, and every level risks waking a Fire guardian. Rise early to keep the safe haul, or dive deeper for more.

1.label: Descend the tube
1.tooltip:
(+) Gather wealth level by level; deep dives can yield Molten Core
(?) Each descent scorches non-Fire mons and risks an eruption
1.selected: You pick your way down into the searing dark...

2.label: Stay at the rim
2.selected: You back away from the heat and move on.

divePrompt: You have gathered {{diveCount}} finds. The rock glows hotter the deeper you go. Descend further, or rise back to the rim with your haul?

push.label: Descend deeper
push.tooltip:
(+) Richer ore and a shot at the Molten Core
(?) More heat, higher chance of an eruption

foundMagma: You pry a rich seam from the tube wall - a hefty sum of gold!
foundNothing: This stretch is bare scorched rock. You find nothing of worth.
foundItem: Half-buried in the slag, you turn up a {{itemName}}! You hand it to {{itemPokemon}}.
scorched: The searing heat sears your non-Fire Pokemon - they're taking damage the deeper you go!
erupts: The tube ROARS! A Fire guardian bursts from the magma - the money you have gathered is safe. Drive it off and you can keep descending!
